title: aster latibracteatus
intro: Aster latibracteatus, also known as Chinese aster, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Aster latibracteatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the seeds can be consumed as a tea or capsule, while the flowers and leaves can be used to make a decoction or tincture.
